summary: First-finish smoke test of Farm & Build (Minecraft freebuild site). 13 backend endpoints + 5 frontend flows verified. All critical paths working.
passed: GET /api/server/status returns ip=mine.farm-and.fr, max_players=100 (200)
GET /api/market/structures returns 8 structures with price/previous_price/change_pct/history fields (200)
GET /api/market/structures/{name}/history returns history array (200)
GET /api/leaderboard returns 10 entries sorted, Steve_Builder at top (balance=125430.5)
GET /api/vote/sites returns 4 sites ordered 1-4
POST /api/auth/register creates user, returns token, sets cookie (200)
Duplicate registration returns 400 with FR error message
POST /api/auth/login invalid creds returns 401
GET /api/auth/me with cookie returns user (200); without cookie returns 401
POST /api/auth/logout returns 200
POST /api/market/structures without X-API-Key returns 403; with key upserts + appends history (200)
POST /api/leaderboard with X-API-Key upserts entry (200)
POST /api/server/status with X-API-Key returns {ok:true}
Frontend Home: IP 'mine.farm-and.fr' displayed, copy-ip-button click OK, server-online badge shows 5/100 after plugin update
Frontend Market /marche: 9 structure cards rendered (8 seed + TestStruct from plugin POST), search filter 'Château' narrows to 1 card
Frontend Leaderboard /classement: Steve_Builder visible in DOM
Frontend Vote /vote: 4 vote buttons (vote-btn-*) rendered
Frontend Register flow: created UITest91656 -> navbar-username appears
Frontend Logout: logout-btn click -> login-nav-btn reappears
Frontend Login flow: re-login with same creds -> navbar-username restored
minor_observations: Recharts emits 'width(-1) height(-1)' warnings on Market mini-charts during initial render (cosmetic, charts still render via ResponsiveContainer)
401 console errors on /api/auth/me before login are expected (cookie absent)
